description: bats-core is not installed. Add it to the devenv Dockerfile (via shared/tools/ or docker/devenv/) so it is always available in containers. This is the prerequisite for all test execution. See research Open Decision #1 for installation method options.
title: Install bats-core in devenv environment

close_reason: Fixed: replaced bare python3 with uv run python3 in allocate_port(); shellcheck clean; committed f4556c8
description: bin/devenv:167-172 — allocate_port() calls bare 'python3' but python3 is not installed in the devenv container. The function always returns 1, causing SSH port allocation to silently fail and fall through to die. Project convention is to use 'uv run python3' for anything Python-related. Recommended fix: rewrite to use 'uv run python3 -c ...' per research Open Decision #6.
title: Bug: allocate_port calls bare python3 which is not installed

This covers bats-core installation, test helpers, fake docker fixtures, primitive tests, CLI contract tests, E2E placeholders, and verification. See research/testing-standard/research.md for the full gap analysis (26 gaps, 2 bugs, 6 open decisions).
title: Implement Testing Standard

title: Create tests/bats/build_devenv_cli.bats

close_reason: Fixed in commit a1cab3b: hardened entrypoint.sh with unconditional state cleanup, two-pass dolt process kill, and final sql-server.info removal before server start
description: Stale sql-server.info files survived container restarts because clean_stale_state() used PID-liveness checks (kill -0) which are unreliable across restarts due to PID reuse. This caused 'database is locked' errors and database corruption. Fixed in commit a1cab3b by: (1) removing all state files unconditionally at boot, (2) two-pass kill of ALL dolt sql-server processes, (3) final rm -f of sql-server.info before starting the new server. Also updated bd hooks to 0.58.0 and docs.
title: Fix: harden entrypoint dolt lifecycle to prevent database lock errors

close_reason: shellcheck passes with zero warnings on all production scripts and test helpers

title: Run shellcheck on all scripts and confirm zero warnings

description: Unit tests for shared/bash/log.sh primitives: log_debug, log_info, log_warning, log_error, die. Test log level filtering via DEVENV_LOG_LEVEL. Key constraint: DEVENV_LOG_LEVEL is readonly after sourcing, and _DEVENV_LOG_SH_SOURCED prevents re-sourcing — each test needing a different log level must run in a fresh subshell. Simplest test file; validates bats framework works. 10 test scenarios per research.
title: Create tests/bats/log_primitives.bats
